name: io.github.daedalusdevelopmentgroup/ddg-agent-services-mcp
title: DDG Agent-Payable Services MCP
description: Remote Streamable HTTP endpoint template for DDG Agent-Payable Services MCP. Do not publish this remote entry until the public URL is deployed and MCP-client smoked.
client_requirements: Pass a stable buyer agent_id argument on paid/order-scoped tools.
Pass only payment-specific headers inside payment_headers; generic Bearer/Basic credentials are dropped.
publication_gate: Copy the remotes block into server.json only after public streamable-http smoke passes.
